user.title: Connect HelloFresh
user.description: Sign in with your HelloFresh account email and password. Home Assistant uses them to log in and keep the connection refreshed automatically.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect HelloFresh
reauth_confirm.description: Enter your HelloFresh account email and password to restore access.

abort.already_configured: This HelloFresh account is already configured

account_data_unavailable.title: HelloFresh account data is unavailable for {entry_title}
account_data_unavailable.description: HelloFresh could not load authenticated account data for **{entry_title}**. The integration is currently falling back to public menu data only. Refresh the integration, or reauthenticate with your HelloFresh email and password if sign-in has stopped working.

account_menu_fallback.title: HelloFresh menu fallback is active for {entry_title}
account_menu_fallback.description: HelloFresh could not load structured menu data for **{entry_title}** from authenticated API responses, so the integration is currently using the public menu page as a fallback. Delivery tracking may still work, but recipe details can be less complete until the API payload is recognized again.

payload_shape_changed.title: HelloFresh account payloads changed for {entry_title}
payload_shape_changed.description: HelloFresh returned authenticated data for **{entry_title}**, but the payload no longer matched the delivery shapes this integration knows how to parse. Diagnostics from this config entry will help confirm whether a regional API variation or a website change needs to be supported.

write_actions_unavailable.title: HelloFresh write actions are not verified for {entry_title}
write_actions_unavailable.description: You tried to use a HelloFresh action that changes account data for **{entry_title}**, such as selecting meals or skipping a week. The integration attempted the known best-effort write endpoints for your account, but none accepted the request, so the action was blocked instead of guessing further.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: The specific HelloFresh account entry to target when multiple accounts are configured.

select_meals.name: Select meals
select_meals.description: Submit meal selections for a delivery week.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: The specific HelloFresh account entry to target when multiple accounts are configured.

recipe_ids.name: Recipe IDs
recipe_ids.description: The recipe identifiers to select for that week.

skip_week.name: Skip week
skip_week.description: Skip a specific HelloFresh delivery week.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: The specific HelloFresh account entry to target when multiple accounts are configured.

unskip_week.name: Unskip week
unskip_week.description: Restore a previously skipped HelloFresh delivery week.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: The specific HelloFresh account entry to target when multiple accounts are configured.

reschedule_week.name: Reschedule week
reschedule_week.description: Move a single HelloFresh delivery week to a different delivery option (slot/day). One-off change; does not affect the recurring schedule.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: The specific HelloFresh account entry to target when multiple accounts are configured.

delivery_option.name: Delivery option
delivery_option.description: The delivery-option handle to move the week to (e.g. US-2-0800-2000).

change_delivery_weekday.name: Change delivery weekday
change_delivery_weekday.description: Change the recurring delivery option and interval for a subscription's plan. Affects all future deliveries.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: The specific HelloFresh account entry to target when multiple accounts are configured.

delivery_interval.name: Delivery interval
delivery_interval.description: How often deliveries recur, in weeks (1 = every week). Defaults to 1.

subscription_id.name: Subscription ID
subscription_id.description: Which subscription to change when multiple exist. Defaults to the primary subscription.
